problem: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved
hypothesis: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Quantum. Quantum annealing for optimization problems directly addresses this.
